A gentle giant loved by everybody.
Loves collecting school rumors— especially ones about teachers.
One of the Junior League's Four Emperors. He'll thread shots given only a sliver of space.
A dark horse who's always happy if he gets noticed for a change.
He floats like a butterfly whenever he gets on the pitch.
He's a doer, not a thinker. Gets tunnel vision when he concentrates.
Excels in a straight sprint, but useless if he has to turn.
Constantly drinks water to keep up with how much he sweats.
An old friend of Dan Rhino's. Seems to think they're rivals.
He was given his name because of his father's love of baseball.
An expert in laboriously rounding up information on opposing teams.
His years as a high jumper gave him the ability to jump like a rocket.
His voice booms like thunder, so his friends often use earplugs.
He may be small and light, but he can upset even the biggest players.
People think of him as being cold, but he does care about his friends.
Wears gloves all the time to protect his hands. Feels weird without them.
He may be a little slow, but he's a master at shielding the ball.
Unrivalled at verbal abuse. He won't stop until someone's in tears.
Loves new things. Whatever it is, he has to buy it.
Has a profound sense of loyalty. He makes friends for life.
His size belies his fear of dogs. Even puppies send him scrambling.
He spends every morning lovingly gelling his trademark spiky hair.
Claims to be able to run so fast that he leaves a vacuum.
The grandson of a famous archer. He never misses his target.
This dour soul prefers his own company. Just as well, since he has no friends.
Runs around on the windiest days. Probably born in a hurricane.
Always acts like one of the boys, but clams up in front of girls.
He and his brothers all work part-time to support their poor family.
His dream is to have one of his sports photos published one day.
Stubborn as a mule. Once he makes his mind up, he won't change it.
He's always first to get to school, but it's a mystery why...
Decided to give up football once he takes up the family business.
Loves walking small dogs. Combined with his giant size, it's a real sight.
He loves the ocean. His dream is to sail the seven seas.
He leads several after-school clubs, so he's always busy.
What's in that large bag he's always carrying around? Nobody knows.
He may be big, but he's as agile as a bee in the air. (A very big bee.)
Obsessed with ancient Chinese history, he quite fancies founding his own dynasty.
He hates playing conventionally and sometimes even ignores the rules.
He's loved to travel ever since he was born on a transatlantic flight.
Born into a prominent family, he is now a bigwig on the student council.
Usually dormant, but prone to explosive bouts of rage.
His gaze can freeze you in your tracks, but he actually likes children and is good at caring for others.
Loves the sun. Often seen running around and soaking up the sunshine.
Has never won a single game of rock, paper, scissors in his life.
A sore loser who never gives up until he wins.
He seriously believes he's the reincarnation of a mythical beast.
The subject of many rumors, some say he lived at school for a whole month.
His mouth is so big, he can fit his entire fist into it.
A master of magic, his moves are faster than the eye can see.
Loves gardening. A big believer in the soothing power of lavender.
A tennis prodigy who flies everywhere in his family's jet.
A staunch traditionalist who bathes every morning in a tin bathtub.
Possesses the ability to listen to several people at once.
Loves planes. Can't decide whether he wants to be a pilot or mechanic.
A school-age sumo wrestler destined to become a top rikishi.
Prone to histrionics. Treats every match like a life-or-death struggle.
A bowling prodigy who got his first perfect 300 while still in primary school.
He's never without his notepad. A fastidious note-taker.
Loves volunteer work. Donates half of his pocket money to charities.
column64: Player Universe: Ramenara | Starting Team: My Team C

column63: A bastion of proper etiquette who simply can't abide ill behavior.
Impervious to the cold, you'll see him in t-shirts even during winter.
An aspiring rescue worker who loves helping people in need.
A master of tactical thinking whose judgements are always spot on.
Loves chowing down on bowl after bowl of plain rice.
With ten brothers, he finds it hard to relax if it is too quiet.
People have been known to refer to him as "melon head" because of his big, round head.
He's always so shy, but he's a whole other person when he gets angry.
He entered the beach volleyball club as he has an eye for the ladies.
One of a pair of twin brothers. Only goes to school when it rains.
He hates fighting and prefers to cheer from the sidelines.
He always gladly shares his food with people who are hungry.
Idolizes football stars. Hopes to be a household name too, one day.
A 6ft beanpole. No matter how tall he gets, his weight stays the same.
His fearsome expression gives his opponents nightmares for weeks.
He's great at fighting, but he never throws the first punch.
Cooks up his own energy drinks to stay up and study all night.
Loves making friends. His mobile is filled with girls' numbers.
A football genius whose condition always lets him down.
He loves sweets and swears by them whenever he needs a boost.
A fan of cheesy love stories who is careful not to let people find out.
A cheerful boy who always has time to feed stray dogs.
A chopstick wiz who even uses chopsticks to eat baked beans.
A world-class tactician on the computer, but not on the pitch.
Loves late night radio. Is that why he always seems tired at school?
Eureka! A truly inspired player. Maybe he'll discover a new move?
A true literature buff who always speaks in proverbs.
Always wears white and becomes very irritable if it gets dirty.
He will eat anything—even before someone else has finished with it.
Loves hot baths filled with fresh flower petals.
Can't settle down. Loves tense, up-tempo matches the most.
One of a pair of twin brothers. Only goes to school when it's sunny.
A child who grew up in the mountains with a pet bear. Prefers growling to talking.
Gets up early for his paper round. Usually knackered by lunchtime.
A returnee student who's lived all over the world. Can talk about football in a range of languages.
A budding guitarist with a knack for ad-libbing lyrics.
For some reason, his defence improves the colder it gets.
An avid follower of the news. His family gets five papers a day.
Loves nothing more than to relax watching fountains in the park.
A sneaky prankster. His favorite prank is the short-sheet trick.
Values loyalty highly. Has no mercy for anyone who crosses him.
Worries about getting sunburnt, so he's always slathered in sun block.
Pulls out all the stops every game. Often comes home caked in mud.
A so-called "Man of Steel" who's never suffered an injury in his life.
Refuses to wear anything but soft, natural, earth-friendly fibers.
Collects chess pieces from all over the world to use in games at school.
His band wants to be the next big thing, but they can't play a note.
Prefers adverts to TV programs. He even records them on tape.
A fanatic toy-car collector. He has over 1,000 in his collection.
Turns to traditional Chinese medicine when he's feeling peaky.
Renowned for giving great advice. There is always a line to his door.
A skilled card shark who claims he's never lost a game.
Claims to keep his riches in a safe, but really it's just full of junk.
Still hasn't grown out of playing marbles with the local kids.
Every summer, he secretly spends his time practicing traditional dancing.
He takes a lot of vitamins and supplements for a child his age...
Speaks with a dry, sardonic wit and is often undeniably right.
Saving every penny he earns from part-time jobs is making him rich.
His obsession with the underground is unique even for trainspotters.
He's an expert in running rings around people on and off the pitch.
Even in the dead of winter, he'll be out playing brilliant football.
He's always wearing Hawaiian shirts that he seems keen to get out of.
He loves watching aeroplanes and has a regular spot at the airport.
Races go-karts and dreams of being a professional race driver one day.
He only dyes his hair on the weekend as hair-dyeing is banned at school.
You won't see him without his legal journal. Knows all about the law.
Loves the open air so much, he lives in a tent in the garden.
Always supports the underdog and helps them find winning strategies.
A pro at swimming who makes it look as effortless as walking.
Thinks cucumbers are the perfect remedy for sunburn.
Claims that someone with his talent is one in a million.
This odd boy is known for running off with other people's food.
Very lazy and hates working. How will he cope when he gets older?
An amateur explorer who dreams of finding an uncharted island one day.
Has excellent peripheral vision thanks to his big eyes.
A music box aficionado. He even makes his own by hand.
It's impossible to tell what he's thinking with his face of stone.
A collector of novelty goods with a penchant for arcade grabbers.
He fears that he's so puny, if he got tackled he might break in two.
A true rice enthusiast, chasing the dream of producing the nation's tastiest grain.
Loves Broadway. Hopes to tread the stage himself one day.
An interior design enthusiast who changes his room's layout daily.
Has green fingers and is always in the garden picking out weeds.
An avid stamp collector, he always has his stamp book close at hand.
Infatuated with cherries. His house is surrounded by cherry trees.
This experienced masseur can untie the knots from anyone's back.
A committed vegetarian, but don't underestimate his game.
This junior detective buys all of his spy gadgets from magazine adverts.
Has a habit of whipping off his top to show off his muscles.
His mum often runs errands as the whole family has short memories.
Has the extraordinary ability to find lost items straight away.
A keen basketball player who hopes to play in America some day.
Always seems to win without lifting a finger. In a word: jammy.
Thinks an old map he inherited is a treasure map. Digs everywhere.
Enthralled by performing dolphins, he aspires to be a trainer one day.
A stubborn kid who fled the school his parents chose for him.
He always wants to get at least three points—whatever the sport or opponent.
Loves carnivals and always joins in with the samba dancing.
He gives life to objects that his friends throw away.
He loves collecting old coins and is often out with a metal detector.
Aims to be a helicopter pilot by practicing on an RC chopper.
A keen advertiser capable of filling the seats at any match.
Gave up on sports after breaking his shoulder playing baseball.
Saves every penny of pocket money he gets in the bank.
A swimmer and sea-water zealot. Refuses to use the school pool.
Sculpts his hair into horns. Only he thinks it looks cool.
Claims to have inherited a mummified unicorn. ("It's at home. Honest!")
Always dresses so well, people are surprised to know his true weight.
A horoscope devotee who always has his lucky power stone with him.
A true bookworm. Deep in study even while walking to school.
Likes fishing in mountain streams, but worries about catching a bear?!
Paranoid about water quality. It's mineral water or nothing for him.
Loves just lying on the grass. Has a kip on the pitch before a match.
An aerobics aficionado who often prances about in '80s leotards.
Usually confident and bubbly, but falls apart when under pressure.
No one can make him change his mind once he's convinced that he's right.
Has an eye for the ladies, even if they don't for him.
Can draw a perfectly straight line without the aid of a ruler.
A wireless hobbyist. Morse code is a second language to him.
Very superstitious, but plagued by bad luck no matter what he does.
His short temper ends up distancing him from other people.
His skin is so tough, it breaks the needle when he gets an injection.
Holds forth with strong opinions, but is really a big softy at heart.
Faithful and trustworthy, his many friends all worship him.
Grew up in the north and sticks to opponents like a frozen lamppost.
Dodges any kind of conflict, even if it makes people think he's a coward.
Wants a pimped-out truck, but has to make do with pimping out his bicycle until he is older.
Likes playground games, but nobody his own age wants to play.
This shy boy rarely ventures out where people can see him.
Likes collecting interesting bits of junk from rubbish bins.
Great at fixing bicycles. He can fix anything with two wheels.
He loves clean shoes so much that he polishes them for free.
Analyses football in an attempt to devise a guaranteed-win strategy.
Makes his own team supporter flags to bring to games.
Always checks whether the pitch is up to scratch before a game.
He may be clever, but nobody likes his confusing riddles.
Protects his eyes with sunglasses even when he's playing football.
Rumored to be traveling abroad after winning a violin recital.
Gets an intense sugar rush from drinking peach juice.
He's usually scruffy, but always turns up for parties in a tux.
His hairstyle is so sharp, it should come with a safety warning.
A real daydreamer who likes to imagine himself saving the day.
Great at studying, but has rarely picked up on sports.
An avid puzzler who's always solving the latest puzzle games.
Likes bridge, but never gets to play because no one knows the rules.
Spends most of his time making up jokes, but they never get a laugh.
This sticky-fingered gangster can break any lock in three minutes flat.
A mythology buff who explores ancient tombs in his free time.
His blog about video games gets over 10,000 hits a day.
Loves his hair so much, he tries to keep it styled through every game.
The 'see-food diet' joke was made for him. He eats anything in sight.
Extremely agile. Can jump over bridges and run down cliff faces.
His long legs mean that there is no pass he can't reach.
Not even the stealthiest gnat can escape this hawk-eyed boy's notice.
Loves both trains and football. Likes taking the train to games.
He runs like a one-legged millipede in treacle, but handles the ball like a pro.
Few know that he's the writer of a wildly popular web novel.
He might look like a thug, but he's a real softy for kittens.
Prefers to hang ten on a sick wave rather than go to school. Duuude.
Autumn's his favorite season. He loves watching falling leaves.
A keen astrologer. Hopes to use his skills in football too some day.
Dreams of moving to the north and running a farm.
Mad about tanks. Always goes to school wearing a helmet.
This junior paparazzo always has a camera slung over his shoulder.
Trains by hiking up mountains. His dream is to climb Everest one day.
An origami fiend. He's been using banknotes instead of paper lately.
This arts-and-crafts machine is working on making a team mascot.
Dreams of living in the tropics and has a large cactus garden.
Has wrists like tree trunks from arm wrestling every day.
Won a prize for junior literature, but no one seems to care...
A real hypochondriac who manages to eat more pills than he does food.
Nobody can get close to him as he douses himself in cologne every day.
He checks his horoscope every morning to see if it'll be a lucky day.
Works on the family farm every day, but has a vendetta against veggies.
Like a homing pigeon or a bad penny, he never gets lost.
A robot fan and a top competitor in robot football tournaments.
Loves taking baths to take the pain out of any injury.
Likes dissecting frogs. Rumor has it that he came from space.
Loves high places. mountain climbing is his favorite hobby.
A trainee stylist. Whenever he sees people's hair, he wants to cut it.
Carries a sleeping bag wherever he goes and naps at the drop of a hat.
Thinks that he could be a JHS tennis champion if he is lucky.
Tends to fall into traps that he makes by himself.
An avid potholer. Recently, he's taken to manholes instead.
Can't get up in the morning without a big helping of noodles.
A classic gentleman who pulls out all the stops on Valentine's Day.
Can run so fast, he leaves a huge dust cloud in his wake!
A talented impersonator who can do all of the teacher's voices.
A huge feng shui buff who always sleeps on the floor.
Carefully bides his time until the right moment—then goes all out!
An internet auction nut. Always checking prices on his phone.
People jokingly refer to him as "The Mask" because of his expressionless face.
His better-than-20/20 vision lets him see clearly for miles.
He's so sharp, no one would dare make fun of his height.
The scion of a long line of footballing monks.
An aspiring plate spinner who finally got it after breaking 300 plates.
He always seems to be damp, even when it hasn't been raining.
Loves a good cuppa. Always relaxes with a brew after every match.
Hooked on ninjas. Collects fake swords, caltrops and ninja stars.
A raging chocoholic with a strange dislike for Valentine's Day.
Fascinated by the pyramids. His family holidays in Egypt every year.
Starts fights, but can't remember why. It's hard to stay mad at him.
Even when sick or dying, he won't risk his perfect attendance record.
A compulsive cleaner who wipes his desk clean before every lesson.
An aspiring comedian whose repertoire of jokes is fifty years out of date.
Head of the sci-fi club. Plans to make a film of his own this year.
Raised by his grandfather, he only knows trivia from yesteryear.
He always carries sports drinks and hands them out to anyone in need.
Plays like a star, but struggles to work as part of a team.
Loves ball games. Throw him a ball and he'll even go fetch.
His nose is as red as a reindeer's. (He's got a bad case of hay fever.)
Would become a thief if it weren't illegal. Now steals balls instead.
Performing on stage made him a pro at performing feints on the pitch.
A young monk who always follows the rules, even when there aren't any!
Concerned about the environment. Recycles absolutely everything.
Works everyone into the ground if he's put in charge.
Cherishes a professional player's boots, which he keeps in a case.
An amateur inventor. Now working on a pair of shot-enhancing boots.
Has a different lucky item for every day of the week.
His passion for foreign culture runs so deep, he sometimes switches languages mid-sentence.
Enters any competition he finds. Rumor has it that he's won a car!
His helmet used to be a cooking pot so he smells like stew (fancy that).
A young singer/songwriter who specializes in football songs.
Obsessed with samurai, he lives by way of the warrior.
His super gnashers can crush even the hardest of gobstoppers.
Makes more money than his dad does by playing the stock market.
Loves eating honey and even picks flowers at school.
Loves being in the spotlight and upstages people at every chance.
Finding a new dinosaur and calling it "Rassosaurus" is his dream.
Wants to be known as a cyborg specialist in the future.
A stubborn die-hard. Sometimes a little too obstinate.
Likes making models. Now working on making the world's biggest one.
Quick to jump on to new fashions, and just as quick to jump off.
This audiophile can't abide even the slightest of off-key singers.
Often ducks under his desk, claiming that he can predict earthquakes.
Loves the feel of the wind in his hair while cycling about town.
Superstitious. He always wears red underpants for luck.
Gentle as a lamb. Gets pushed around even by little girls.
Likes shiny stones. Searches for them in the river every weekend.
Has 10 fish tanks of tropical fish. It's hard work taking care of them.
Can't do anything without making sure to check his horoscope first.
His father's shop does really well whenever he helps out.
Puts ketchup on everything... even on desserts.
A cloud gazer who can forecast the weather just by looking at clouds.
An avid bug catcher. Has a whole collection of them in his desk.
An enthusiastic diarist, he's always looking for new things to write.
Hates it when others mess about when he's working hard.
Likes brand clothing. Even his school uniform cost a fortune.
Collects bubblegum cards, but never eats the sweets.
A dark horse who vanishes just as suddenly as he appears.
Hates confrontations. Always first to step in and resolve conflicts.
Always fast asleep at school... even while eating or walking around!
A diving pro. Goes fishing by hand every weekend in the forest.
Loves making clothes for dolls, but doesn't make anything full-size.
Grows like a tropical plant, and even more so when it rains.
Never mind Cupid's arrow—he's got Cupid's artillery on his side.
This nocturnal stargazer is rarely awake during lessons.
An aspiring fireman who's already saved his neighborhood once.
His phone always goes off in class with the latest stock market news.
A bit of a lazybones, but he's good at motivating people.
Loves being by the lake, swimming and canoeing every weekend.
A master at aikido. Throws anyone, even while playing football!
A mythology nut who collects tales about legends and monsters.
Has played table tennis since he was eight, but sometimes wants to hit bigger balls.
Used to live on a deserted island. Goes everywhere by foot.
Addicted to taking tests. There isn't a qualification he hasn't got.
Makes people laugh with his unique, prancing victory dance.
His family prefers to get water from a well instead of from the tap.
Enjoys reading books in his room with the lights down low.
He grew up in a shopping arcade and prefers the bustle of sale days.
Has a natural affinity for high places. Sleeps in a tree house.
A professional arcade player who never fails to win no matter what.
A self-styled prince of the ladies. He preens himself day and night.
Plotting to get his sister to be a model so he can meet other models.
Curls up like a prawn and performs acrobatics to confound opponents.
Joined the drama club to be an actor, but bombs every time.
Gifted with numbers. He's a human scientific calculator.
The ladies love his cheeky smile, but he's crying on the inside.
This budding gardener will plant flowers practically anywhere.
A farmer's child who swears his family's rice is the tastiest.
A cartoon nut with a special taste for stuff from the early days.
Always comes to school late. Pops out of nowhere around lunchtime.
Unbeatable at office work. Can empty the in-tray in seconds.
Hates his name and wants to be a writer so he can adopt a pen name.
Laughs one minute and cries the next. He changes like the weather.
A raging tea fiend whose kitchen is stocked with over 100 kinds.
A bonsai aficionado who carries a bonsai pot wherever he goes.
His vocal range is nothing short of astounding, switching from grandpa to child in an instant.
Enjoys playing in department store playrooms while his mum shops.
Lacking in self-confidence, he's on a journey to find himself.
Helps out in a care home and wants to be a specialist some day.
Even without a watch, he can tell exactly how much lost time needs to be added.
Loves the summer, but wilts in every other season.
Has a knack for drawing. Does all the artwork for the school paper.
A perceptive super-sleuth, he even puts the police to shame.
A hotshot who's a very sore loser, but cares about his gang.
Believes underwear is the mark of a gentleman and only wears the best.
He can courier up to thirty portions of noodles from his family's shop.
Supernaturally gifted. He knows where all the school ghosts are.
Puts his nimble fingers to good use by designing small accessories.
Very knowledgeable about collecting antiques for a boy his age.
Runs around the beach every day, so his feet are as tough as boots.
Carries a first-aid kit and keeps an eye out for people in trouble.
So in touch with his emotions, he's always crying about something.
His looks and name make him seem weak, but he's really a powerhouse.
Uses a big fan to support his team enthusiastically.
Possesses superhuman strength. Can open the stubbornest of jars.
A palindrome enthusiast. He even answers questions in palindromes.
Animals are just naturally drawn to him without him doing anything.
Can't afford a real guitar—now the world's best air guitarist.
An avid collector of timepieces who is desperate to get foreign clocks.
Likes looking after kids and wants to be a nursery school teacher.
His dignified paintings have always won the school art competitions.
He's reputedly very bright, but nobody understands what he says!
Surprisingly fit—he's never even caught a cold.
Likes foreign goods and sends off for them regularly by himself.
Collects rumors going about school for the school paper.
Dances on street corners with his friends in matching pink uniforms.
Loves horse racing and hopes to have a horse of his own one day.
A regular at family restaurants because of the drink bar. Loves mixing drinks to invent new recipes.
Loves antiques. His house is said to be full of ancient treasures.
Lives for festivals. He's always decked out in festive attire.
column64: Player Universe: Whistlaria | Starting Team: My Team B

column63: A voracious eater. Strawberry sundaes are his favourite.
Prepares for any eventuality and never gets flustered.
Always the first to get to the empty seat on any bus or train.
Can see better at night, but feels very sleepy in the daytime.
Gets a quick power boost whenever he eats fresh vegetables.
Draws lots whenever he needs to make a decision.
An avid collector of footballer trading cards.
Claims he can see 3,000 years into the future. (No one believes him.)
His hobby is making wax seals, which he hands out to his friends.
Likes viewing volcanoes. All the sulphur makes him smell a bit eggy.
Practicing to be a comedian. He could do with a partner.
Part of the crowd in the day, but stands out like a beacon at night.
Seems to get thinner every day and appears close to falling over.
Takes daily strolls in the park every morning and every night.
Compulsively brushes his teeth within 5 minutes of any meal.
Sticks to attackers like glue, but gets snappy if they break free.
An archetypal gentle giant who has a kind word for everyone.
Completely loses track of the time whenever he's having fun.
A life-long yoga practitioner who's so limber, he never gets hurt.
Dreams of successfully excavating an undiscovered dinosaur fossil.
His family runs a spa, but he hates helping out in the changing rooms.
Currently teaching his pet cormorants how to catch fish.
He has so many electric goods that he rents them out to anyone asking.
A watercolor genius. He's even painted using nothing but tears.
A fan of Chinese culture. Wants to work in international relations.
Just mad about Korean food. Makes a variety of flavors at home.
A fan of army rangers. Scales the school walls as practice.
Loves seaweed and even eats it instead of dessert.
An amateur chemist who always has a test tube handy.
A balloon animal master. Can make anything from aardvarks to zebras.
Loves the thrill of danger. Often heads out in search of adventure.
Sneezes uncontrollably whenever there is anything bad in the air.
Likes to imagine what places on the map must be like.
Terrified of getting injured. Spends a fortune on insurance.
He may be a boy, but likes sewing and makes clothes for his sister.
A student in the track and field club with Nathan.
His family is famous for flower arranging, but he prefers football.
A connoisseur of citrus, he just loves oranges, lemons and the rest.
A yacht enthusiast who hopes to sail around the world one day.
An avid collector of comic books. Has over 1,000 books at home.
Likes collecting precious ores and making them into jewels.
Has a strange fascination with bulldozers and diggers.
A very thrifty penny-pincher. Gets mad if he gets short-changed.
Can't wait until he's old enough to drive and take a girl for a ride.
A huge fan of crème caramel. Getting quite wobbly these days.
column64: Player Universe: Odenius | Starting Team: My Team A

column63: Likes collecting foreign magazines. Wants to open his own newsstand.
Used to be a punk, but learnt discipline through football.
His family makes crackers, but he wants to be a pâtissier.
Collects hand-made things. His favorite is a large wooden bear.
A present-wrapping pro. Even helps out at shops during the holidays.
Sweats so much his clothes are always drenched. (Poor boy.)
Never feels quite right unless he's had five glasses of juice a day.
Enjoys listening to foreign radio with a big, old-fashioned set.
Takes care of his teeth as he often grinds them during a match.
A budding bonsai keeper who has over fifty trees at home.
Precocious. Hands out his business card to the cutest girls.
Skilled at predicting fashions, he never fails to spot the next hit.
Known for irritating the school by broadcasting mic tests on the PA.
He has a private tutor, but his test scores haven't improved one bit.
His parents are restaurateurs, so he knows hundreds of recipes.
Dreams of spending a romantic day playing on the beach with a girl.
His expression rarely changes, so people often say he's like a robot.
Moved by dramas, he wants to be a concierge at a glamorous hotel.
Loves robot cartoons. His room is practically filled with robot toys.
Loves herbal tea. Always relaxes with a brew before every match.
An arcade pro. He can win over 10,000 tokens in a single session.
His family is so poor, he helps out by selling artificial flowers.
Dreams of living on a boat and has begun building his own raft.
A cop drama fan who can't wait for a crime to be discovered at school.
Loves instant noodles and hunts down all of the latest flavors.
Too young to grow a beard, but always drenched in aftershave.
A bit peculiar and old-fashioned. Replies to texts by postcard.
A ramen aficionado who won't eat anything but tonkotsu ramen.
May appear distant, but he has a real eye for talent.
Wants to become a translator and bring over the best foreign works.
Goes to museums to bone up on as much trivia as he can.
A live music fan who really comes out of his shell at concerts.
Every summer, he goes to stay at a resort and live in the lap of luxury.
An expert on mythology. He knows a myriad of legendary tales.
Diplomacy comes naturally to him. Wants to be an ambassador one day.
His family runs a pharmacy that makes special health drinks.
Loves the lottery and always talks about how he'd spend the prize money.
A junior bourgeois, he spends all summer at foreign beach resorts.
Loves dim sum and regularly haunts his local Chinese tea shop.
He can distinguish between wines by smell like a proper sommelier.
A folk music expert. Has won folk singing contests in the past.
Butch enough to wave the team's flag throughout a game by himself.
Loves cars so much, he wants to live in one when he grows up.
Collects trophies from the various competitions he has entered.
An AV enthusiast who has an elaborate HD setup at home.
